name: Overdue Books
query:
SELECT
  bi.name AS `Book Issue:Link/Book Issue:140`,
  bi.member AS `Member:Link/Library Member:140`,
  lm.member_name AS `Member Name:Data:160`,
  bi.book AS `Book:Link/Book:160`,
  bi.issue_date AS `Issue Date:Date:110`,
  bi.due_date AS `Due Date:Date:110`,
  DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), bi.due_date) AS `Days Overdue:Int:120`
FROM `tabBook Issue` bi
LEFT JOIN `tabLibrary Member` lm ON lm.name = bi.member
WHERE bi.docstatus = 1
  AND bi.status IN ('Issued', 'Overdue')
  AND bi.due_date < CURDATE()
ORDER BY bi.due_date ASC
